APPEARANCES:
John M. Gerding, Esq. of JACKSON & WALLACE 982-6300, for defendant Kaiser Gypsum Inc., moving party
Defendant KAISER GYPSUM INC.'s motion for summary judgment is GRANTED, plaintiff
failed to respond to special interrogatories which were sent months previously, shifts
burden. No triable issue of fact created by specification for hospital. Request
for 437(c)(h) continuance is denied, plaintiff have had adequate time to conduct
discovery. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (AJR/301/MD) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR 1193
